name: Green Roads — Weekly Tracker + Low Performance Emailer

parameters.content:
## Green Roads — Weekly Publisher Tracker + Low Performance Emailer

**Schedule:** Every Monday 08:00 AM UTC
**Detects:** New publishers · weekly sales · zero activity · low clicks
**Emails:** Publishers with < 100 clicks via Gmail (once per week max)
**Output:** Tab 4, Tab 5, Tab 6, Tab 7
**Depends on:** Tab 1 from Workflow 1 as master source of truth

### Workflow variables required:
- `AWIN_ADVERTISER_ID`
- `SHEET_ID`
- `LOW_CLICK_THRESHOLD` (default 100)
- `ZERO_ACTIVITY_THRESHOLD` (default 2)
- `HUNTER_MONTHLY_LIMIT` (default 480)

### Credentials to map after import:
- `AWIN_API_TOKEN` (httpHeaderAuth → Authorization: Bearer …)
- `AWIN_SESSION_COOKIE` (httpHeaderAuth → Cookie: …)
- `HUNTER_API_KEY` (httpQueryAuth → api_key=…)
- `GOOGLE_SHEETS_OAUTH` (Google Sheets OAuth2)
- `GMAIL_OAUTH` (Gmail OAuth2)
- Sender name + address are stored on the Gmail node parameters

### Section W1 — Triggers
Monday 08:00 UTC + manual.

nodes.name: Weekly Trigger — Every Monday 08:00 AM UTC

parameters.content:
### Section W2 — Generate week date range
Last Mon→Sun derived from `now`.

### Section W3 — Detect new publishers this week
AWIN list ↔ Master sheet diff.
Wait 3000 ms — AWIN 20 req/min hard limit.

nodes.name: Read Known Publisher IDs from Master Tab

parameters.content:
### Section W4 — Enrich new publishers (per item via SplitInBatches)
Profile scrape → Hunter fallback → save to New + Master tabs.

nodes.name: IF: Any New Publishers This Week?

parameters.content:
TRUE → enrich each new publisher.
FALSE → skip Section W4 entirely.

nodes.name: Batch — One New Publisher at a Time

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

nodes.name: AWIN UI — Scrape New Publisher Profile

parameters.content: Wait 4000 ms — session-ban prevention.

nodes.name: IF: New Publisher Has Email from Profile?

parameters.content:
TRUE → skip Hunter, build record.
FALSE → extract domain, try Hunter.

nodes.name: IF: Valid Domain for Hunter — New Publisher?

parameters.content:
TRUE → Hunter enrichment.
FALSE → build record with empty email.
Wait 5000 ms — Hunter pre-call buffer.
Wait 2000 ms — post-Hunter spacing.

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $json;

const email = d.scraped_email || d.hunter_email || '';
const emailSource = d.scraped_email ? 'AWIN Profile'
                  : d.hunter_email  ? 'Hunter.io'
                  : 'Not Found';

const contactName = d.scraped_contact_name
  || [d.hunter_first_name, d.hunter_last_name].filter(Boolean).join(' ')
  || '';

const phone = d.scraped_phone || d.hunter_phone || '';
const weekStart = $('Generate Last Week Date Range').item.json.week_start;

return [{
  json: {
    publisher_id:      d.id,
    publisher_name:    d.name || d.publisherName || '',
    contact_name:      contactName,
    email:             email,
    email_source:      emailSource,
    email_confidence:  d.hunter_confidence || '',
    phone:             phone,
    website:           d.scraped_website || d.domain || '',
    domain:            d.domain || '',
    promo_type:        d.primaryType || '',
    region:            d.primaryRegion || '',
    join_date:         weekStart,
    clicks_week:       0,
    transactions_week: 0,
    commission_week:   0,
    clicks:            0,
    impressions:       0,
    transactions:      0,
    commission:        0,
    status:            'active',
    date_detected:     new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
    date_scraped:      new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
    detected_as:       'new_this_week'
  }
}];

nodes.name: Save to New Publishers This Week Tab
Save New Publisher to Master Publishers Tab

parameters.content: Always keep Master tab as full source of truth — also writes here in addition to New Publishers tab.

### Section W5 — Weekly sales fetch
Branch B runs in parallel from W2.

nodes.name: AWIN — Get Weekly Publisher Sales Report

parameters.content: Wait 3000 ms — AWIN 20 req/min hard limit.

nodes.name: Save Weekly Sales Report to Tab

parameters.content:
### Section W6 — Zero activity detection (Branch C)
Flag publishers with ≥ ZERO_ACTIVITY_THRESHOLD consecutive zero-activity weeks.

nodes.name: IF: Publisher Inactive Long Enough to Flag?

parameters.content:
TRUE → log to Zero Activity Alert.
FALSE → drop.

### Section W7 — Low performance email alert (Branch D)
Clicks < LOW_CLICK_THRESHOLD ⇒ personalized Gmail. Once per publisher per week.

nodes.name: Read Publisher Emails from Master Tab
Match Low Performer to Contact Email
IF: Low Performer Has Contact Email?

parameters.content:
TRUE → dedup + send.
FALSE → log row with email_sent=false.

nodes.name: Log Low Performer — No Email on File
Read Low Performance Log for Dedup Check
Check: Already Emailed This Publisher This Week?
IF: Email Already Sent This Week?

parameters.content:
TRUE → skip (no duplicate send).
FALSE → build & send.

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $json;
const firstName = (d.contact_name || 'Affiliate Partner').split(' ')[0];
const clicks       = d.clicks || 0;
const transactions = d.transactions || 0;
const commission   = parseFloat(d.total_commission || 0).toFixed(2);
const weekStart    = d.week_start;
const weekEnd      = d.week_end;

const subject = `Your Green Roads affiliate performance update — week of ${weekStart}`;

const body = [
  `Hi ${firstName},`,
  '',
  'Thank you for being a Green Roads affiliate partner. We truly value',
  'your continued support in promoting our products.',
  '',
  `We noticed your account generated ${clicks} click${clicks !== 1 ? 's' : ''} during the week of`,
  `${weekStart} to ${weekEnd}, which is below our typical partner benchmark of 100 clicks per week.`,
  '',
  'Here is your performance summary for that week:',
  '',
  `  Clicks:       ${clicks}`,
  `  Transactions: ${transactions}`,
  `  Commission:   $${commission}`,
  '',
  'We want to help you grow. Here are a few resources that consistently',
  'help our top partners improve their results:',
  '',
  '  1. Fresh creatives',
  '     New banners, product images, and ad copy are available in your',
  '     AWIN dashboard under the Creatives tab. Updated visuals improve',
  '     click-through rates significantly.',
  '',
  '  2. Active promotions and discount codes',
  '     Check the Offers tab in AWIN for our latest deals. Sharing',
  '     exclusive codes with your audience drives urgency and conversions.',
  '',
  '  3. Top converting products right now',
  '     Our CBD oils, gummies, and topicals are performing strongly.',
  '     Reply to this email if you would like dedicated product links',
  '     or a custom landing page for your audience.',
  '',
  '  4. Content support',
  '     If you create blog, social, or newsletter content, we can',
  '     provide product briefs, talking points, and SEO-friendly copy',
  '     tailored to your audience — just ask.',
  '',
  'If you have any questions or need anything at all, simply reply to',
  'this email. Our affiliate team responds within one business day.',
  '',
  'We are here to help you succeed.',
  '',
  'Warm regards,',
  'Green Roads Affiliate Team',
  'affiliates@greenroads.com',
  'https://www.greenroads.com'
].join('\n');

return [{
  json: {
    ...d,
    email_subject: subject,
    email_body:    body,
    recipient:     d.contact_email
  }
}];

parameters.content: Wait 2000 ms — Gmail free 500/day · Workspace 2000/day. >200 publishers ⇒ swap to SendGrid/Mailgun.

nodes.name: Gmail — Send Low Performance Alert Email

parameters.content: Wait 2000 ms — stay within Gmail daily limits.
### Rate-limit error handler (utility — wire from any HTTP node's error output)
